traits.name: Charge
traits.description: If the minotaur moves at least 10 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a Gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away and have the Prone condition.

traits.name: Labyrinthine Recall
traits.description: The minotaur can perfectly recall any path it has traveled.

traits.name: Reckless
traits.description: At the start of its turn, the minotaur can gain Advantage on all melee attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against it have Advantage until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The minotaur makes two Abyssal Glaive attacks, or it makes one Abyssal Glaive attack and one Gore attack.

actions.name: Abyssal Glaive
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Gore
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.environment: Abyssal labyrinths, corrupted mazes, demonic strongholds, twisted dungeons
tactical_info.tactics: Charges for extra damage and knockdown, uses reckless attacks for advantage, combines glaive reach with gore attacks
tactical_info.weaknesses: Reckless attacks leave it vulnerable, low intelligence makes it predictable, relies heavily on brute force
